text.title: lessons-learned Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for lessons-learned as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Lessons captured only at project end.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Recency bias and survivorship bias dominate: only the last few weeks are memorable, and only people still on the project participate.

failure-mode.description: Blame sessions framed as lessons-learned meetings.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Teams stop sharing honestly when the session becomes a post-mortem of individual failures. Facilitator must enforce "process not people" ground rule actively.

failure-mode.description: LLM summarisation of retro notes producing generic platitudes.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Summarisation compresses two distinct lessons into one homogeneous statement. Preserve verbatim quotes alongside derived summaries.
